text.tspan: to Q2 base -> SSR-001 DC IN - (Domain 1)
panel: SW-002 state pull-up pin (PROT input only)
from CT-001 burden / bias (Domain 2 airflow interlock)
Pi 5 host (Zone E, Artisan) USB-A 115200 baud serial
USB also feeds +5 V to the SSR drive (Domain 1); Pi 5 has WiFi for the
iPad WebLCDs bridge (DR-017) — no extra wiring on this diagram.
ESP32 with shared SPI bus to 3x MAX31855 (CS lines individual).
DR-016: SW-002 Heater Enable inline in SSR drive + state read on GPIO 35; LED-001/002 on GPIO 25/26.
DR-017: Pi 5 host on Zone E via USB serial; same Pi serves Artisan WebLCDs to iPad over WiFi.
All signal wiring 22-26 AWG, routed away from mains. SPI cables shielded; FERR-001 ferrites at each end.
